Read:

.github\agents
- prompts/00-project-context.md
- AGENTS.md
- docs/PRODUCT_SPEC.md

Task:
Build the final project builder/export system for the MVP.

Goal:
At the end of the semester, the player should receive a GitHub-ready beginner project package.

Requirements:
- create a final project state model
- unlock project pieces as the player progresses through courses
- generate a final project summary view
- include:
  - project title
  - project concept
  - problem statement
  - feature list
  - suggested tech stack
  - starter README text
  - suggested folder structure
  - what-I-learned summary
- keep the implementation browser-only
- do not add backend export services
- structure it so future project tracks can be added later

Return:
- complete updated files
- explanation
- recommended commit message
